title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Interio

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Godrej Interio
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!
